# OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership.owner

**Case**

Describes code that owns the lock.

## Declaration

```swift
case owner
```

## Specifying ownership

- **OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership.notOwner**: Describes code that doesn’t own the lock.
